exam_name: Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central Functional Consultant

testing_centers.notes: Available at Certiport Authorized Testing Centers (primarily academic)

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name on ID must match registration. For online: webcam required, room must be clear of people and materials.
exam_rules: No notes, books, or study materials. No phones or smartwatches. Whiteboard or scratch paper may be provided by testing center. Online: no dual monitors, no virtual machines, no headphones, must be alone in a closed room.
renewal_options: Microsoft certifications (Associate/Expert/Specialty) are renewed annually for free via a short renewal assessment on Microsoft Learn. Renewal assessment available 6 months before expiry. Fundamentals certifications do not expire.
target_audience: Candidates implement Dynamics 365 Business Central. Candidates configure the core application, create companies, migrate data and collaborate with implementation teams to ensure usability and effective business management. Candidates implement and configure Business Central modules, including: Financial management, Sales, Purchasing, Inventory, Fixed Assets. Candidates have applied experience meeting business requirements and may specialize in one or more Business Central feature areas. They configure role centers, including insights, cues, action tiles, reports and charts, and expand functionality by using extensions. Candidates configure and use Copilot capabilities in Business Central, including built-in agents. They understand how to integrate Business Central with other technologies, including Microsoft 365, Microsoft Power Platform, Microsoft Dynamics 365.

retake_policy.notes: No waiting period for first retake if score >= 500 on failed attempt. If score < 500: 14-day waiting period before retake. Maximum 5 attempts per exam per year (365 days). Free retake voucher sometimes included in official instructor-led training.

objectives.title: Create and configure a company
sub_objectives: Create a company by using Assisted Setup
Create and use a configuration package

objectives.id: Migrate data to and within Business Central
objectives.title: Migrate data to and within Business Central
Manage security
sub_objectives: Assign user permissions by using security groups and permission sets
Configure and use security auditing in Business Central

objectives.title: Set up core functionality
sub_objectives: Set up reports and configure report layouts
Set up and use job queues
Set up dimensions and dimension values
Set up global dimensions and shortcut dimensions
Set up default dimensions for master data
Set up blocking combinations of dimensions and dimension values
Set up default dimensions for account types
Set up users for approval and workflow user groups

objectives.title: Set up financial management
sub_objectives: Prepare financial reporting with financial data and account categories

objectives.id: Set up journals and bank accounts
objectives.title: Set up journals and bank accounts
sub_objectives: Create journal templates, including number series

objectives.title: Set up accounts payables
sub_objectives: Create vendor accounts, including payment terms, vendor bank accounts, and related records
Assess the relationship between vendors, vendor ledger entries, detailed vendor ledger entries, and general ledger entries

objectives.title: Set up accounts receivables
sub_objectives: Create customer accounts, including payment terms, payment methods, customer bank accounts, and related records
Assess the relationship between customers, customer ledger entries, detailed customer ledger entries, and general ledger entries

objectives.title: Configure fixed assets
sub_objectives: Configure fixed asset settings, including depreciation books and fixed asset classes and subclasses
Create and modify fixed assets, main assets, and components

objectives.title: Set up inventory
sub_objectives: Configure core item settings, including item categories, item attributes, units of measure, and item variants
Assess the relationship between items, item ledger entries, value entries, and general ledger entries

objectives.id: Configure master data for sales and purchasing
objectives.title: Configure master data for sales and purchasing
sub_objectives: Configure core customer settings including shipping agents, locations, and shipping addresses
Configure core vendor settings including order address, lead time, and locations

objectives.title: Manage pricing and discounts
sub_objectives: Manage purchase line and invoice discounts
Manage sales line and invoice discounts

objectives.id: Perform basic tasks in Business Central
objectives.title: Perform basic tasks in Business Central
sub_objectives: Differentiate between designing, customizing, and personalizing pages
Perform data updates by using the Edit in Excel feature
Configure and use data analysis mode

objectives.title: Process purchases
sub_objectives: Receive items for a purchase order
Create a posted invoice from a purchase order

objectives.title: Process sales
sub_objectives: Convert a sales quote into a sales order or sales invoice
Ship items for a sales order
Create a sales invoice from a sales order

objectives.title: Process financial documents
sub_objectives: Combine sales shipments into a single sales invoice
Combine purchase receipts into a single purchase invoice
Process prepayment invoices for purchases and sales

objectives.title: Process journals and payments
sub_objectives: Process payments by using payment journals
Process receipts by using the cash receipt journal
Apply ledger entries and undo applied entries
Process recurring transactions by using the recurring journals

official_study_resources.title: Microsoft Learn (free self-paced training)
official_study_resources.notes: Free official learning paths mapped to each exam

official_study_resources.title: Microsoft Official Practice Assessment
official_study_resources.notes: Free official practice questions on Microsoft Learn

aliases: microsoft certified dynamics 365 business central functional consultant associate
microsoft dynamics 365 business central functional consultant
